text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know I've gotta practice, but still... I don't want
anyone seein' me all weak like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She needs to get reacclimated with racing in a
pack, but she's struggling to bring herself to run
with a partner.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know I gotta run with somebody. But if I look
weak in front of 'em, I'm done for...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'd never live it down. I'd be the laughing stock of
the academy—of the whole racin' scene. The
media and fans'd tear me apart...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She won't budge. Her thorny upbringing has left
some real scars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But we're not out of options. We just have to find
some runners who won't take advantage of her
weakness...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hello there, Tamtam, I'm here for the partner run.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Creek... Sorry to drag ya all the way here. But
yeah, I know I can trust ya...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer, you want to help Tamtam learn to
hold her own in a pack, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I'll be of very much help on my own...
We'll need at least one more person if we're going
to practice fencing Tamtam in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. But I don't know a single other
student at Tracen who's as kind and gentle as
Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If only we had one more person... Just one more...
Can I join you?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're about to do a partner run, right? I was just
looking for someone to race...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: O-Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Why, Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap—a student who transferred to the
central racing scene from the regional races. She's
also known for her voracious appetite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She and Tamamo Cross share a dorm room, and
I've heard they get along. But the question is, will
Tamamo Cross let her join?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been doing great in my scrimmages
lately. The competition keeps forcing me to the
far outside.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If I don't step up my performance, I won't make a
dent in the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I could just go back to my hometown
empty-handed... but I don't want that. This
summer, if I can just...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri... So you've been havin' troubles too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross looks straight into Oguri Cap's
eyes...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri... Let's do this. We're doin' this.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Let's go on a partner run—the three of us! You,
me 'n Creek!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're letting me join?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
'Course I'm lettin' ya join. We both got somethin'
we gotta do. This is no time to be standin' still.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No doubt about it! We're gonna find a way to
smash through all the walls in front of us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the three-person partner running session
begins.

text_block_list.name: Oguri and Creek
text_block_list.text:
Raaaaaah!
Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and Super Creek sprint ahead first as
Tamamo Cross waits, eyes on Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's with that form? Trainer, don't ya
think her body looks a little low?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A low center of gravity is a trait shared by many
successful runners. If that's how Oguri Cap runs,
then she has a lot of promise.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I've seen that type of runnin' before someplace...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I know. It's like that big ol' pooch at the
park...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I used to take my siblings to the park, and
sometimes I'd see this massive dog.

text_block_list.name: Big Dog
text_block_list.text: Woof! Woof, woof!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa geez, your owner must be a real
moneybags. Hey, quit dat!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That pooch used to come jumpin' all over me.
He'd get down low—then he'd pounce like "bam!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And it'd knock me over like a bowling pin each
time. Seein' Oguri like that brings me back.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri doesn't get as low, but if she went all the
way...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huuuup!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh?! Tamtam, what are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Steadying her breathing, Tamamo Cross stoops
down, lowering her short frame even farther.
choice_data_list: Now try dashing, just like that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya think this'll work, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I don't know. But it's worth a shot.
I don't know. But it's worth a shot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It checks out. The lower she is, the shorter the
fall.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we take the pack head-on with this running
form...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri! Creek! Let's get this trio run started!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Raaaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three runners vie ferociously for the lead.
Will Tamamo Cross's new running form make a
difference?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Grrr! Hraaaagh! Whoa, this is new...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm holdin' out—I got this! Nothin's topplin' me over. I might be sandwiched in... but my legs aren't tremblin'!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, Tamtam...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The results are clear as day. Tamamo Cross is
running in a partner race without any fear.
However...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're not getting away from me, Tama!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Agh! It's not easy stayin' low for this long... Gotta
find my second wind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross has no choice but to drop back.
The combination of her lingering fear and the
exhaustion of maintaining a low running position
are keeping her from overcoming her physical
disadvantage.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A new running form isn't gonna cut it... I need
something else too... Just one more thing should
do it! One more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Tamamo Cross struggle, I carefully
consider our situation. I feel like we're forgetting
something important.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We do need to hold our ground in the running
crowd, that's for sure, but that's not the reason
we're running. Our end goal is to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her small stature, there's no need for her to
be jostling up against the competition for long
periods of time. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: White Lightnin'...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... That's right... My secret weapon... is
comin' in like a flash of light!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't gotta fight all the other racers. If I can
zoom right by 'em... then problem solved!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maintaining her low posture, Tamamo Cross
opens up a considerable gap before launching
into her pursuit—like an arrow being drawn back
before it fires.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hunch down. Gather energy 'n then... Blow pass
all of 'em! I'll seize da win in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Check out da new 'n improved White Lightnin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kashaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the race, everyone is left at a loss for
words. It's as if nobody can believe what they just
saw.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Tama's running just now...
choice_data_list: That was a testament to the strength in her legs.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Tama's running just now...
choice_data_list: That was a testament to the strength in her legs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's no easy feat to maintain that posture while
running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fortitude of Tamamo Cross's legs has taken
us from the depths of despair to dizzying new
heights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She persevered despite the pain, and searched
for her own path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, through her sheer tenacity, she's
stumbled upon a new running style that'll let her
race without paying the crowd any mind.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, you two. And thanks, Trainer. I know
what to do now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This isn't me runnin' away from danger, this is me
findin' a new path to gettin' stronger. I'll outstrip
everyone 'n blast ahead!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna train like crazy this summer. By the end
of the season, my new form's gonna be second
nature.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm never gonna stay put again! Trainer, gimme all
ya got.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The murky clouds that formed after the accident
finally clear up, and White Lightning crackles
anew.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And it's thanks to Tamamo Cross's latent
potential and creativity... as well as a certain
dream-chaser from the countryside.
